text: Stepping through the bright, clinical hallway into this exhibit, I sense anticipation rising in me. The world outside the glass fades, and I am drawn to the vibrant colors and bold letters—R+D—filled with the promise of discovery. I feel curious and slightly in awe, humbled by the potential of human creativity on display. The space hums with the energy of innovation, and I am eager to immerse myself in the dialogue between humanity and technology.
